query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 2 people from Indianapolis to Huntsville from November 5th to November 7th, 2024, with a budget of $1,350. Accommodations should follow the house rule of not allowing children under 10.

properties.name: Modern Ranch on Monte Sano Mtn
properties.title: Home in Huntsville

properties.description: Sugarbush Hill is a "State Of The Art" maple sugaring operation near the Town of Huntsville. We are the largest sugarhouse open to the public on a year round basis in the District of Muskoka. We offer 100% pure maple syrup and other delicious maple products produced right here from our own sugarbush. SUGARHOUSE TOURS and TASTINGS from May to October, please check tour times and hours on our website under "Contact" and "Tours Details". Reservations and payment is required for tours in advance as they fill up quickly. See our huge eco-friendly and highly efficient wood-fired evaporator, many displays of maple antiques and artifacts or stroll our maple forest. We would be pleased to take the time to explain the complete maple sugaring process from the past to the present day. A Canadian heritage at it's finest is waiting for you. For your premium MUSKOKA MAPLE EXPERIENCE come to Sugarbush Hill Maple Farm and see what all the fuss has been about for centuries.

properties.description: Huntsville Escape Rooms is a fun, new entertainment experience. If you've ever played the board game clue, it's similar to that but in real life! Escape the room in under 60 minutes solving puzzles and finding clues. We think you'll leave saying it was one of the best 60 minutes spent with friends!

properties.description: The Downtown Dish Huntsville Food Tour is a cultural walking tour within the historic downtown area. Think of it as a fun, one-of-a-kind, food adventure with a dash of know how and a sprinkling of humor. The tour combines a sampling of Huntsville's culinary delights along with a behind-the-scenes look at the city's unique heritage.

properties.description: The 118-acre Huntsville Botanical Garden is open year-round and contains a diverse ecosystem of meadows, upland and bottomland forest, and wetlands, as well as a variety of specialty gardens and native plant collections. The Mathews Nature Trail contains the largest accredited trillium collection in the U.S. and the Anderson Education Center is home to the nation’s largest open-air butterfly house. The Native Plants Teaching Garden is a public space that highlights the way local plants, soil, pollinators, and birds create distinct communities and how they interact to form a diverse, sustainable, and attractive landscape. A 501(c)(3) non-profit organization, the Garden is a member of the American Public Gardens Association, the North American Plant Collections Consortium, and the American Horticultural Society, as well as an ArbNet-accredited arboretum.

properties.description: We are a steakhouse specializing in fresh seafood and premium aged steaks, as well as gourmet salads, pastas and more! Enjoy a memorable evening with friends and family in our well-appointed dining rooms, or stop by for the lunch you and your associates deserve. Our friendly service and flavorful fare will keep you coming back for more.

properties.description: Hildegard's German Cuisine serves meals that are freshly prepared, perfectly seasoned, and remind you of dishes served in your Oma's kitchen. You will never leave Hildegard's hungry! Pair your meal with one of our extensive collection of German wine and beer, and don't forget to check out our decadent dessert case. We look forward to seeing you soon!

properties.name: The Boot Pizzeria
properties.description:
Italian villa ... Italian restaurant run and operated by Italian people... This is no your typical pasta , pizza place ... All menu item are freshly made and prepared from scratch ... Pizza dough has not preservatives , the tomato sauce has a zero sodium conts , NO MSG, the pasta is hand roll daily, the desserts all made by the Italian mama in the kitchen  all is Italian style homemade !!!!!!!!!!!!!  This restaurant is like traveling overseas without leaving your zip code .... And the food has an accent!!!!

I am the owner Elisa de Baggis massimi I will respect  my food , my heritage my culture by providing what I know is true, authentic, fresh and it is Italian food !!!!
